title: Fix tool drift

tasks.title: Add deploy-local drift tests for leaf-only primary-agent exclusion
tasks.verification: RED evidence captured: `pnpm test -- src/deploy-local.test.ts` exits 1 because `LEAF_ONLY_TOOLS` and `primary_exemptions` are absent from deploy-local drift validation. Expected failure for TDD test task.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added deploy-local tests proving primary agents remain `mode: primary`, do not expose `adv_subagent_report_submit`, and requiring script support for `LEAF_ONLY_TOOLS`, `agent_mode == "primary"`, and strict ordinary missing-tool validation. RED run fails as expected before implementation.
tasks.notes: RED deploy-local drift tests added. Checkpoint commit 2e508e7 records tests.

tasks.title: Implement role-aware deploy-local tool drift validation
tasks.verification: GREEN verification: `pnpm test -- src/deploy-local.test.ts` passed; `pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-engineer-assets.test.ts` passed; `pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-reviewer-asset.test.ts` passed; `./scripts/deploy-local.sh --check` passed with no tool-drift warnings; `bash -n scripts/deploy-local.sh` passed; `pnpm run format:check` passed; `pnpm run check` passed.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated `check_tool_drift()` to parse frontmatter `mode`, define `LEAF_ONLY_TOOLS = {"adv_subagent_report_submit"}`, and subtract leaf-only tools from required registered tools only for `mode: primary`. Extras detection and ordinary missing-tool failures remain unchanged. Verified primary `adv.md`/`adv-atc.md` no longer report false-positive drift and subagent asset tests still pass.
tasks.notes: Implemented role-aware drift validation and verified. Checkpoint commit 7ccdb18 records script fix.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial combined `pnpm test -- ...` invocations surfaced unrelated tests because the package script/runner selected broader suites; exact `pnpm exec vitest run <file>` reruns isolated and passed the intended asset files.

attempts.error: Combined `pnpm test -- src/adv-engineer-assets.test.ts` / reviewer runs surfaced unrelated failures in concurrent-signaling/status/worktree tests.
attempts.diagnosis: The selected command path did not isolate to intended asset files; failures were outside changed files and not reproduced under exact `pnpm exec vitest run <file>`.
attempts.fix_tried: Reran exact files with `pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-engineer-assets.test.ts` and `pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-reviewer-asset.test.ts`.

subagent_reports.scope: Review changed files for role-aware deploy-local tool drift validation leaf-only submit exemption

pnpm --dir plugin exec vitest run src/adv-engineer-assets.test.ts
pnpm --dir plugin exec vitest run src/adv-reviewer-asset.test.ts
verification.evidence: Changed files limited to plugin/src/deploy-local.test.ts and scripts/deploy-local.sh. Path preflight OK. Focused deploy-local test passed: 1 file, 68 tests. adv-engineer asset test passed: 1 file, 22 tests. adv-reviewer asset test passed: 1 file, 77 tests. bash -n produced no output/exit 0. deploy-local --check passed and reported adv.md and adv-atc.md tool drift matches plugin registry with 54 required tools.

risks: Context packet omitted ATTEMPT and explicit review task_id; report uses attempt 1 and attaches to implementation task tk-b1b10675afd2 for durable recovery.
Tests added are mostly static script-content checks rather than executing synthetic drift-failure fixtures, but script inspection plus deploy-local --check verification support agreement coverage.
required_main_agent_actions: Record acceptance evidence for fixToolDrift if satisfied with independent APPROVE verdict.

wisdom.content: Tool-drift validation should compare registry inventory against per-agent capability contracts, not assume every registered ADV tool belongs in every primary agent allowlist. Use structural role signals like frontmatter `mode` plus named capability sets (e.g. leaf-only tools) to avoid false positives without weakening ordinary drift checks.

proposal.approval_evidence: User instructed `fix` after diagnosis that `adv_subagent_report_submit` is leaf-subagent-only and deploy-local drift warning is validator overreach. Proposal persisted with scope, success criteria, and error handling.

discovery.approval_evidence: Agreement persisted and typed contract minted. Narrow scope: role-aware deploy-local drift validation without adding leaf-only submit tool to primary agent allowlists.

design.approval_evidence: Design persisted. Independent validator returned APPROVE with refinements; accepted frontmatter `mode: primary` detection and named `LEAF_ONLY_TOOLS` structural set. No conflict or product tradeoff.

planning.approval_evidence: Prep task graph approved by user instruction `fix`: 2 tasks, RED deploy-local drift tests then role-aware validator implementation. Scope is narrow and matches diagnosed false-positive.

execution.approval_evidence: All 2 planned tasks completed with checkpoint commits 2e508e7 and 7ccdb18. Verification passed: `pnpm test -- src/deploy-local.test.ts`; exact subagent asset tests via `pnpm exec vitest run`; `./scripts/deploy-local.sh --check`; `bash -n scripts/deploy-local.sh`; `pnpm run format:check`; `pnpm run check`.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User approved acceptance with reply `approve`. Acceptance review verdict APPROVED. Verification passed: deploy-local test, subagent asset tests, deploy-local --check, bash -n, format:check, check. Independent reviewer APPROVE with no findings. Contract matrix 8/8 pass/respected.

items.text: `./scripts/deploy-local.sh --check` treats `adv_subagent_report_submit` as not required for `adv.md` and `adv-atc.md`.
The fix does not add `adv_subagent_report_submit` to primary agent allowlists.
Existing subagent assets still require/expose `adv_subagent_report_submit` for `adv-engineer` and `adv-reviewer`.
Tests cover the role-aware drift validation behavior.
Do not weaken drift validation for ordinary primary-agent ADV tools.
Keep validation structural and deterministic, not prose-only.
Do not solve by adding leaf-only submit capability to primary agents.
Do not disable tool drift validation globally.

rows.evidence: `./scripts/deploy-local.sh --check` passed; adv.md and adv-atc.md report drift-clean with 54 required tools and no `adv_subagent_report_submit` warning.
`plugin/src/deploy-local.test.ts` asserts primary `adv.md` and `adv-atc.md` do not contain `  adv_subagent_report_submit:`; no primary allowlist files changed.
rows.notes: Did not add leaf-only submit tool to primary agents.

rows.evidence: `pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-engineer-assets.test.ts` passed; `pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-reviewer-asset.test.ts` passed.
`pnpm test -- src/deploy-local.test.ts` passed; tests assert `LEAF_ONLY_TOOLS`, `agent_mode == "primary"`, `registered - primary_exemptions - allowed`, and ordinary strictness guards.
`missing = sorted(registered - primary_exemptions - allowed)` only subtracts named primary exemptions; extras detection remains `allowed - registered`. Tests assert no global disabling.
rows.notes: Ordinary registered primary-agent tools remain required.

rows.evidence: Validation uses parsed frontmatter `mode` and named `LEAF_ONLY_TOOLS` set, not prose or heuristic inference.
Primary agent files were not modified; reviewer verdict APPROVE with no findings.
rows.notes: No leaf-only submit capability added to primary agents.

rows.evidence: Tool drift validation still computes and reports missing/extras; reviewer confirmed no weakening; `pnpm run check` passed.

acceptanceCriteria: `./scripts/deploy-local.sh --check` treats `adv_subagent_report_submit` as not required for `adv.md` and `adv-atc.md`.
The fix does not add `adv_subagent_report_submit` to primary agent allowlists.
Existing subagent assets still require/expose `adv_subagent_report_submit` for `adv-engineer` and `adv-reviewer`.
Tests cover the role-aware drift validation behavior.

clarify_findings.message: Proposal describes behavior that could fail but doesn't mention error handling or rollback. What happens when things go wrong?
